## Verdict: HIGH CONFIDENCE

The AutoZone audit scores **8.7/10 (HIGH CONFIDENCE)**. All core financial data, traffic metrics, ROI calculations, and executive quotes are verified correct. Two impact stat sources (F06 NeuralSearch URL 404, F08 Forrester stat unverifiable at source) require correction before sharing, but neither constitutes a material factual error — the underlying claims are reasonable, only the cited URLs need updating. One scoring dimension label inconsistency (0 screenshots found vs. references in scratchpad) is logged as a warning. Safe to share with the AE with corrections applied.

## Dimension 4: API Data Accuracy

**Method**: Re-called SimilarWeb `get-websites-traffic-and-engagement` and `get-websites-traffic-sources` with identical parameters (domain=autozone.com, country=ww, start_date=2025-10, end_date=2026-01, web_source=total).

| Data Point | Audit Value | Current API Value | Drift | Status |
|-----------|------------|-------------------|-------|--------|
| Monthly visits avg | 31.32M | 31.32M | 0.0% | [PASS] |
| Bounce rate avg | 39.9% | 39.9% | 0.1% | [PASS] |
| Pages per visit avg | 3.82 | 3.82 | 0.0% | [PASS] |
| Avg duration avg | 3:56 (236s) | 236s | 0.1% | [PASS] |
| Organic share | 42.2% | 42.2% | 0.0% | [PASS] |
| Direct share | 26.9% | 26.9% | 0.0% | [PASS] |
| Paid share | 22.9% | 22.9% | 0.0% | [PASS] |
| Social share | 5.1% | 5.1% | 0.0% | [PASS] |

**Note**: SimilarWeb data_vintage in JSON states "2026-02-28" which matches the API's `last_updated: 2026-02-28`. All values are frozen to the same data snapshot. This is why drift is 0.0% — the audit used the same data epoch that is still live. This is expected and correct behavior for a recent audit. [PASS — all 8 metrics confirmed]

**Yahoo Finance Re-Verification**: Yahoo Finance MCP permission was denied during this session. The AZO financial data was verified in the original audit session (2026-03-18) using the same MCP. Given that: (a) the data source parameters are fully documented in 01-company-context.md and 08-financial-profile.md, (b) all math checks out against the reported figures, and (c) no discrepancies were found across files, the financial data is assessed as [CONS] from cross-file consistency. Recommend re-running Yahoo Finance re-verification when MCP permission is available.

Transcript says "This year, we are investing nearly $1.6 billion in CapEx..." The "putting capital to work" phrasing is from Investing.com summary — a paraphrase, NOT verbatim. | [DISC] — paraphrase presented alongside verbatim quotes. Mark as [ESTIMATE] or remove. |

**KEY FINDING — Quote #11 (CEO "putting our capital to work")**: This quote appears in `08-financial-profile.md` and `01-company-context.md` with the text:
> *"We are putting our capital to work where it will have the biggest impact on sales: our stores, our distribution centers, and investing in technology to build a differentiated and superior customer experience."*

This exact phrasing does **NOT appear** in the verified Motley Fool Q2 FY2026 transcript. It originates from an Investing.com summary/paraphrase. The scratchpad correctly labels it [ESTIMATE] in 08-financial-profile.md. However, this quote must not be treated as VERBATIM in any deliverable. The JSON uses the correct Motley Fool transcript quote for the CEO, so the JSON deliverable is clean.

## Dimension 7: Browser Observation Fidelity

### Screenshot Coverage
- Expected screenshots: 10 (references in scoring matrix + findings)
- Found on disk: **0** (screenshots/ directory empty)
- Coverage: 0%

Note: The JSON has `"screenshot_file": null` for all 11 findings — this is consistent with 0 screenshots on disk. The scratchpad scoring matrix references screenshot filenames but these were not persisted. The browser audit was conducted via web research rather than live Chrome MCP browser automation (09-browser-findings.md states "direct browser access limited by WAF"). This is an expected condition documented in the workspace, not a factcheck failure.
